transcript: Speaker A: Bro, bad English bro. HR rejected me. Speaker B: Without communication skills, getting a job is tough, bro. I have personal experience. So first, improve English. Time's already running. Practice with that AI teacher in the MySivi app. Many people are using it. Only 20 minutes daily. In 7 days, you'll feel confident enough to face any HR in this world. Getting a job is easy, bro. But don't go to interviews with poor English and all. It's too embarrassing. Install MySivi and improve English the easy way.
on_screen_text: That one friend's advice 🔥 | How did your interview go!? | Bad English bro | HR rejected me | communication skills | getting a job is | tough bro. | personal experience. | So first improve English | Time's already running. | Practice with that | AI teacher in the | MySivi | Many people are using it. | Only 20 minutes daily. | In 7 days | you'll feel confident | enough to face | any HR in this world. | Getting a job is easy bro. | but don't go to | interviews with poor English | and all. | It's too embarrassing. | Install | MySivi | and improve English | the easy way. | Okay bro ❤️
summary: A chat conversation shows a user sharing their job rejection due to poor English. A friend recommends using the MySivi app's AI teacher for 20 minutes daily to build confidence. The ad warns against the embarrassment of poor English in interviews and urges installing the app.
